name: tokenlock
description: Design-token enforcement for hardcoded colors and raw Tailwind palette utilities.

interface.shortDescription: Find hardcoded colors and suggest project tokens.
interface.longDescription: Design-token enforcement for coding agents. It catches hardcoded colors and raw Tailwind palette utilities, then suggests the matching token from the project's token files.
defaultPrompt: Check this change for hardcoded colors.
Find Tailwind palette utilities in src/.
